summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 655

core_modules.description: Core modeling primitives and global runtime helpers; primary public API surface used by nearly all Pyro models.
Stochastic variational inference driver; central training loop for model/guide optimization.
MCMC orchestration API for running Markov chain inference with configurable kernels.
No-U-Turn Sampler kernel; most common adaptive HMC kernel in Pyro.
Posterior predictive sampling utilities for trained models.
Effect handler entrypoints for tracing and transforming probabilistic programs.
Neural module integration layer binding PyTorch modules to Pyro parameter/sample semantics.
Global parameter store implementation used by param() and inference backends.
Extended distribution namespace re-exporting Pyro and torch distributions/transforms.

cli_commands.description: Repository does not expose stable console_scripts/CLI entrypoints in scanned package paths; usage is library-first via imports and examples.
